title: 「The more / less..., the more / less...」關聯句
titleZh: 「The more / less..., the more / less...」成對比較句

source.file: Sentence Structure 85 - 「The more _ less..., the more _ less...」關聯句.pdf
omissions: The PDF presents the rule and benefit explanations mainly in Traditional Chinese; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.

formula: The more / less + subject + verb, the more / less + subject + verb.

formulas.formula: The more / less + subject + verb, the more / less + subject + verb.
The more / less + noun + subject + verb, the more / less + noun + subject + verb.
The more / less + adjective + subject + be / become, the more / less + adjective + subject + be / become.
The more / less + adverb + subject + verb, the more / less + adverb + subject + verb.

example: I have always thought that the more I studied, the smarter I could become.
exampleZh: 我一直認為，我讀得越多，就會變得越聰明。

examples.en: I have always thought that the more I studied, the smarter I could become.
examples.zh: 我一直認為，我讀得越多，就會變得越聰明。
examples.highlight: the more I studied, the smarter I could become

examples.en: The more I revise, the more confident I feel.
examples.zh: 我溫習得越多，就越有信心。
examples.highlight: The more I revise, the more confident I feel.

examples.en: The more I hurry, the less carefully I work.
examples.zh: 我越急着完成，工作時就越不仔細。
examples.highlight: The more I hurry, the less carefully I work.

examples.en: The less time I waste, the more work I finish.
examples.zh: 我浪費的時間越少，完成的工作就越多。
examples.highlight: The less time I waste, the more work I finish.

examples.en: The less noise there is, the less distracted I feel.
examples.zh: 噪音越少，我就越不容易分心。
examples.highlight: The less noise there is, the less distracted I feel.

zh: The more + X, the more + Y：X 越多／越強，Y 也越多／越強。
The more + X, the less + Y：X 越多／越強，Y 便越少／越弱。
The less + X, the more + Y：X 越少／越弱，Y 便越多／越強。
The less + X, the less + Y：X 越少／越弱，Y 也越少／越弱。

rules.zh: 兩部分都要使用 the。在這個句型中，兩項變化前都需要使用 the。
rules.en: Use the in both parts. In this structure, the must appear before both changes.
examples: Correct: The more you practise, the more confident you become.
Incorrect: The more you practise, you become more confident.

rules.zh: 這裏的 the 並不是一般冠詞；它表示「變化的程度」。the more 表示「越多／越……」，the less 表示「越少／越不……」。
rules.en: Here, the is not an ordinary article; it indicates the degree of change. The more means an increasing amount or degree, while the less means a decreasing amount or degree.

rules.zh: 兩部分之間通常使用逗號。
rules.en: A comma is normally used between the two parts.
examples: The less you worry, the more clearly you can think.

rules.zh: more 和 less 可以修飾不同種類的詞語，包括名詞、形容詞和副詞。
rules.en: More and less can modify different kinds of words, including nouns, adjectives and adverbs.
examples: Noun: The more water you drink, ...
Adjective: The more confident you become, ...
Adverb: The more carefully you listen, ...

rules.zh: 不要重複使用比較形式。smarter 本身已經是 smart 的比較級，因此不需要寫成 more smarter；同樣不要寫 more easier 或 more faster。
rules.en: Do not use a double comparative. Smarter is already the comparative form of smart, so do not write more smarter; likewise, avoid more easier and more faster.
examples: Incorrect: more smarter; more easier; more faster

rules.zh: less 通常修飾程度或不可數名詞，例如 the less time、the less water、the less stress 和 the less difficult。可數複數名詞一般使用 fewer，例如 fewer mistakes；本練習集中訓練 more 和 less 四種主要組合，因此題目會避免要求學生使用 fewer。
rules.en: Less normally modifies a degree or an uncountable noun, as in the less time, the less water, the less stress and the less difficult. Plural countable nouns generally take fewer, as in fewer mistakes; this exercise focuses on the four main more and less combinations and therefore avoids items requiring fewer.

rules.zh: 時態和情態動詞可以改變。改寫時，必須保留原句的時態、可能性和語氣。
rules.en: Tense and modal verbs may vary. When rewriting, preserve the original tense, possibility and tone.
examples: The more I practised, the more confident I became.
The less support workers receive, the more anxious they may feel.

rules.zh: 句型可以放在 think、believe、notice 等說法之後；前面的說法必須保留，不可只寫後面的比較部分。
rules.en: The structure can follow expressions such as think, believe and notice. Keep the introductory expression rather than writing only the comparative part.
examples: I believe that the less we complain, the more energy we have.

rules.zh: 這個句型表達兩項互相關連的變化。它可以描述一般規律、生活經驗、趨勢或可能出現的結果，但不一定表示百分之百必然發生。
rules.en: This structure expresses two related changes. It can describe general patterns, life experience, trends or possible results, but it does not necessarily claim that the result is certain.

benefits.zh: 清楚表達兩項同時改變的事情。這個句型能讓讀者立即看出：當第一項事情增加或減少時，第二項事情會怎樣改變。
benefits.en: It clearly expresses two things changing together. Readers can immediately see how the second change relates to an increase or decrease in the first.
examples: The less sleep you get, the more tired you feel.

benefits.zh: 把較長的解釋連成一句。The more students practise, the more confident they become. 直接把兩項變化放在一起，兩者之間的關係更加明顯。
benefits.en: It joins a longer explanation into one sentence. The correlative version places both changes together and makes their relationship clearer.
examples: Ordinary: When students practise more, they become more confident.
Target: The more students practise, the more confident they become.

benefits.zh: 適合解釋習慣、趨勢和因果關係。你可以用這個句型談論學習、健康、工作、科技和社會情況。
benefits.en: It is suitable for explaining habits, trends and cause-and-effect relationships in learning, health, work, technology and society.
examples: The more carefully a company plans, the fewer problems it usually faces.

benefits.zh: 幫助組織較深入的觀點。在作文、報告或討論中，這個句型能把「一項改變」和「相關結果」有條理地連接起來，而不需要分成多句解釋。
benefits.en: It helps organise a more developed idea by connecting a change and its related result clearly in an essay, report or discussion without requiring several separate sentences.

benefits.zh: 提供一個容易使用的口語框架。說話時，可以先使用 The more..., the more... 或 The less..., the more...，然後加入自己的內容，從而更快組織答案。
benefits.en: It provides an easy speaking frame. Begin with The more..., the more... or The less..., the more..., then add your own content to organise an answer more quickly.

benefits.zh: 增加句式變化。你不需要每次都使用 when、if、because 或 as；這個句型提供另一種自然的表達方式，令說話和寫作不會顯得過分重複。
benefits.en: It adds sentence variety. You do not need to rely every time on when, if, because or as, so speaking and writing sound less repetitive.

sourceOmissions: English rule and benefit explanations are faithful editorial translations because the PDF supplies those teaching explanations mainly in Traditional Chinese.

en: Rewrite each sentence using one of the four “the more / less..., the more / less...” patterns.
Preserve the original meaning, tense and degree of certainty.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用四種「the more / less..., the more / less...」句型之一改寫以下句子。
請保留原句的意思、時態和肯定程度。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: When you read more, you learn more words.
questions.promptZh: 當你閱讀得更多時，你會學到更多詞彙。
questions.answer: The more you read, the more words you learn.
questions.answerZh: 你閱讀得越多，學到的詞彙就越多。
questions.highlight: The more you read, the more words you learn.

questions.prompt: As Mia practises the piano more often, she becomes more confident.
questions.promptZh: 隨着米婭更常練習鋼琴，她變得更有信心。
questions.answer: The more often Mia practises the piano, the more confident she becomes.
questions.answerZh: 米婭越常練習鋼琴，就變得越有信心。
questions.highlight: The more often Mia practises the piano, the more confident she becomes.

questions.prompt: When I drink more water, I feel less thirsty.
questions.promptZh: 當我喝更多水時，我便不會那麼口渴。
questions.answer: The more water I drink, the less thirsty I feel.
questions.answerZh: 我喝的水越多，就越不口渴。
questions.highlight: The more water I drink, the less thirsty I feel.

questions.prompt: When Tom sleeps less, he feels more tired the next day.
questions.promptZh: 當湯姆睡得較少時，他第二天會感到更疲倦。
questions.answer: The less Tom sleeps, the more tired he feels the next day.
questions.answerZh: 湯姆睡得越少，第二天就越疲倦。
questions.highlight: The less Tom sleeps, the more tired he feels the next day.

questions.prompt: As we eat less sugar, our diet becomes more balanced.
questions.promptZh: 隨着我們少吃糖，飲食會變得更均衡。
questions.answer: The less sugar we eat, the more balanced our diet becomes.
questions.answerZh: 我們吃的糖越少，飲食就越均衡。
questions.highlight: The less sugar we eat, the more balanced our diet becomes.

questions.prompt: If you listen more carefully, you remember more information.
questions.promptZh: 如果你聽得更仔細，便會記得更多資料。
questions.answer: The more carefully you listen, the more information you remember.
questions.answerZh: 你聽得越仔細，記得的資料就越多。
questions.highlight: The more carefully you listen, the more information you remember.

questions.prompt: Lily feels less stressed when she spends more time outdoors.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉在戶外逗留更長時間時，會感到較少壓力。
questions.answer: The more time Lily spends outdoors, the less stressed she feels.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉在戶外逗留的時間越長，感到的壓力就越少。
questions.highlight: The more time Lily spends outdoors, the less stressed she feels.

questions.prompt: Ben becomes more focused when he checks his phone less often.
questions.promptZh: 本較少查看手機時，會變得更加專注。
questions.answer: The less often Ben checks his phone, the more focused he becomes.
questions.answerZh: 本查看手機的次數越少，就變得越專注。
questions.highlight: The less often Ben checks his phone, the more focused he becomes.

questions.prompt: If we waste less food, we produce less rubbish.
questions.promptZh: 如果我們浪費較少食物，便會製造較少垃圾。
questions.answer: The less food we waste, the less rubbish we produce.
questions.answerZh: 我們浪費的食物越少，製造的垃圾就越少。
questions.highlight: The less food we waste, the less rubbish we produce.

questions.prompt: I have noticed that when I revise more, I feel more prepared.
questions.promptZh: 我留意到，當我溫習得更多時，便會覺得準備得更充分。
questions.answer: I have noticed that the more I revise, the more prepared I feel.
questions.answerZh: 我留意到，我溫習得越多，就越覺得準備充分。
questions.highlight: I have noticed that the more I revise, the more prepared I feel.

questions.prompt: Plants grow more quickly when they receive more sunlight.
questions.promptZh: 植物得到更多陽光時，會生長得更快。
questions.answer: The more sunlight the plants receive, the more quickly they grow.
questions.answerZh: 植物得到的陽光越多，生長得就越快。
questions.highlight: The more sunlight the plants receive, the more quickly they grow.

questions.prompt: The journey feels less comfortable as the bus becomes more crowded.
questions.promptZh: 隨着巴士變得更擠迫，車程會令人感到較不舒服。
questions.answer: The more crowded the bus becomes, the less comfortable the journey feels.
questions.answerZh: 巴士越擠迫，車程就越不舒服。
questions.highlight: The more crowded the bus becomes, the less comfortable the journey feels.

questions.prompt: Ava can save more money if she spends less on snacks.
questions.promptZh: 如果艾娃少花錢買零食，她便可以儲起更多金錢。
questions.answer: The less money Ava spends on snacks, the more money she can save.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃花在零食上的金錢越少，能儲起的金錢就越多。
questions.highlight: The less money Ava spends on snacks, the more money she can save.

questions.prompt: Our journey takes less time when there is less traffic.
questions.promptZh: 交通較少時，我們的車程所需時間也較短。
questions.answer: The less traffic there is, the less time our journey takes.
questions.answerZh: 交通越少，我們的車程所需時間就越短。
questions.highlight: The less traffic there is, the less time our journey takes.

questions.prompt: Our teacher says that asking more questions helps us understand the lesson more clearly.
questions.promptZh: 老師說，提出更多問題有助我們更清楚地理解課堂內容。
questions.answer: Our teacher says that the more questions we ask, the more clearly we understand the lesson.
questions.answerZh: 老師說，我們提出的問題越多，就越能清楚理解課堂內容。
questions.highlight: Our teacher says that the more questions we ask, the more clearly we understand the lesson.

questions.prompt: Daniel's back feels less stiff when he does more exercise.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾做更多運動時，背部會感到較不僵硬。
questions.answer: The more exercise Daniel does, the less stiff his back feels.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾做的運動越多，背部就越不僵硬。
questions.highlight: The more exercise Daniel does, the less stiff his back feels.

questions.prompt: People who spend less time planning usually make more mistakes.
questions.promptZh: 花較少時間規劃的人，通常會犯更多錯誤。
questions.answer: The less time people spend planning, the more mistakes they make.
questions.answerZh: 人們花在規劃上的時間越少，犯的錯誤就越多。
questions.highlight: The less time people spend planning, the more mistakes they make.

questions.prompt: Children with less screen time before bed usually feel less restless at bedtime.
questions.promptZh: 睡前使用螢幕時間較少的兒童，臨睡時通常較少感到焦躁。
questions.answer: The less screen time children have before bed, the less restless they feel.
questions.answerZh: 兒童睡前使用螢幕的時間越少，便越少感到焦躁。
questions.highlight: The less screen time children have before bed, the less restless they feel.

questions.prompt: More organised notes reduce the time you need to find information.
questions.promptZh: 筆記越有條理，尋找資料所需的時間便會減少。
questions.answer: The more organised your notes are, the less time you need to find information.
questions.answerZh: 你的筆記越有條理，尋找資料所需的時間就越少。
questions.highlight: The more organised your notes are, the less time you need to find information.

questions.prompt: I believe that when we complain less, we have more energy to solve problems.
questions.promptZh: 我相信，當我們少一點抱怨時，便有更多精力解決問題。
questions.answer: I believe that the less we complain, the more energy we have to solve problems.
questions.answerZh: 我相信，我們抱怨得越少，就有越多精力解決問題。
questions.highlight: I believe that the less we complain, the more energy we have to solve problems.

questions.prompt: The chef gets more consistent results when she measures the ingredients more carefully.
questions.promptZh: 廚師更仔細地量度材料時，做出來的效果會更加穩定。
questions.answer: The more carefully the chef measures the ingredients, the more consistent her results become.
questions.answerZh: 廚師量度材料時越仔細，做出來的效果就越穩定。
questions.highlight: The more carefully the chef measures the ingredients, the more consistent her results become.

questions.prompt: Users have less privacy when a website collects more information.
questions.promptZh: 網站收集更多資料時，使用者擁有的私隱會減少。
questions.answer: The more information a website collects, the less privacy its users have.
questions.answerZh: 網站收集的資料越多，使用者擁有的私隱就越少。
questions.highlight: The more information a website collects, the less privacy its users have.

questions.prompt: A machine is more likely to break down if it is maintained less often.
questions.promptZh: 如果機器較少接受保養，便更容易發生故障。
questions.answer: The less often a machine is maintained, the more likely it is to break down.
questions.answerZh: 機器接受保養的次數越少，就越容易發生故障。
questions.highlight: The less often a machine is maintained, the more likely it is to break down.

questions.prompt: The company spends less money on electricity when the building uses less energy.
questions.promptZh: 大樓使用較少能源時，公司花在電力上的金錢也會減少。
questions.answer: The less energy the building uses, the less money the company spends on electricity.
questions.answerZh: 大樓使用的能源越少，公司花在電力上的金錢就越少。
questions.highlight: The less energy the building uses, the less money the company spends on electricity.

questions.prompt: The manager found that when she explained the task more clearly, the team worked more efficiently.
questions.promptZh: 經理發現，當她更清楚地解釋任務時，團隊的工作效率會更高。
questions.answer: The manager found that the more clearly she explained the task, the more efficiently the team worked.
questions.answerZh: 經理發現，她越清楚地解釋任務，團隊的工作效率就越高。
questions.highlight: The manager found that the more clearly she explained the task, the more efficiently the team worked.

questions.prompt: The city produces less air pollution when people use public transport more.
questions.promptZh: 市民更常使用公共交通工具時，城市產生的空氣污染會減少。
questions.answer: The more public transport people use, the less air pollution the city produces.
questions.answerZh: 人們使用公共交通工具越多，城市產生的空氣污染就越少。
questions.highlight: The more public transport people use, the less air pollution the city produces.

questions.prompt: New workers may feel more anxious when they receive less support.
questions.promptZh: 新入職員工得到較少支援時，可能會感到更加焦慮。
questions.answer: The less support new workers receive, the more anxious they may feel.
questions.answerZh: 新入職員工得到的支援越少，就可能越感到焦慮。
questions.highlight: The less support new workers receive, the more anxious they may feel.

questions.prompt: A product creates less waste if it has less packaging.
questions.promptZh: 如果產品使用較少包裝，便會產生較少廢物。
questions.answer: The less packaging a product has, the less waste it creates.
questions.answerZh: 產品的包裝越少，產生的廢物就越少。
questions.highlight: The less packaging a product has, the less waste it creates.

questions.prompt: A customer is more willing to listen when you respond to a complaint more calmly.
questions.promptZh: 當你更冷靜地回應投訴時，顧客會更願意聆聽。
questions.answer: The more calmly you respond to a complaint, the more willing a customer is to listen.
questions.answerZh: 你回應投訴時越冷靜，顧客就越願意聆聽。
questions.highlight: The more calmly you respond to a complaint, the more willing a customer is to listen.

questions.prompt: Researchers have found that teenagers find it more difficult to concentrate when they get less sleep.
questions.promptZh: 研究人員發現，青少年睡得較少時，會更難集中精神。
questions.answer: Researchers have found that the less sleep teenagers get, the more difficult it is for them to concentrate.
questions.answerZh: 研究人員發現，青少年睡得越少，就越難集中精神。
questions.highlight: Researchers have found that the less sleep teenagers get, the more difficult it is for them to concentrate.

questions.prompt: A menu with more choices may make it more difficult for customers to decide.
questions.promptZh: 菜單提供更多選擇，可能會令顧客更難作出決定。
questions.answer: The more choices a menu offers, the more difficult it may be for customers to decide.
questions.answerZh: 菜單提供的選擇越多，顧客可能就越難作出決定。
questions.highlight: The more choices a menu offers, the more difficult it may be for customers to decide.

questions.prompt: A more accurate weather forecast makes travellers less likely to be caught unprepared.
questions.promptZh: 更準確的天氣預報會令旅客較不容易措手不及。
questions.answer: The more accurate the weather forecast is, the less likely travellers are to be caught unprepared.
questions.answerZh: 天氣預報越準確，旅客就越不容易措手不及。
questions.highlight: The more accurate the weather forecast is, the less likely travellers are to be caught unprepared.

questions.prompt: Keeping patients waiting for less time tends to make them more satisfied.
questions.promptZh: 縮短病人的等候時間，通常會令他們更加滿意。
questions.answer: The less time a hospital keeps patients waiting, the more satisfied they tend to be.
questions.answerZh: 醫院讓病人等候的時間越短，他們通常就越滿意。
questions.highlight: The less time a hospital keeps patients waiting, the more satisfied they tend to be.

questions.prompt: An office needs less storage space when it uses less paper.
questions.promptZh: 辦公室使用較少紙張時，所需的儲存空間也較少。
questions.answer: The less paper an office uses, the less storage space it needs.
questions.answerZh: 辦公室使用的紙張越少，所需的儲存空間就越少。
questions.highlight: The less paper an office uses, the less storage space it needs.

questions.prompt: I have learnt that people can solve a problem more quickly when they discuss it more honestly.
questions.promptZh: 我明白到，人們越坦誠地討論問題，便越能迅速解決問題。
questions.answer: I have learnt that the more honestly people discuss a problem, the more quickly they can solve it.
questions.answerZh: 我明白到，人們討論問題時越坦誠，就越能迅速解決問題。
questions.highlight: I have learnt that the more honestly people discuss a problem, the more quickly they can solve it.

questions.prompt: A more detailed online form makes some users less likely to complete it.
questions.promptZh: 網上表格越詳細，部分使用者完成表格的可能性便越低。
questions.answer: The more detailed an online form is, the less likely some users are to complete it.
questions.answerZh: 網上表格越詳細，部分使用者完成它的可能性就越低。
questions.highlight: The more detailed an online form is, the less likely some users are to complete it.

questions.prompt: Changing its plan less frequently allows a team to work more steadily.
questions.promptZh: 較少更改計劃，可讓團隊工作得更加穩定。
questions.answer: The less frequently a team changes its plan, the more steadily it can work.
questions.answerZh: 團隊更改計劃的次數越少，工作就可以越穩定。
questions.highlight: The less frequently a team changes its plan, the more steadily it can work.

questions.prompt: A refrigerator needs less electricity when less cold air escapes from it.
questions.promptZh: 雪櫃流失較少冷空氣時，所需的電力也較少。
questions.answer: The less cold air a refrigerator loses, the less electricity it needs.
questions.answerZh: 雪櫃流失的冷空氣越少，所需的電力就越少。
questions.highlight: The less cold air a refrigerator loses, the less electricity it needs.

questions.prompt: Students become less dependent when teachers control every step less closely.
questions.promptZh: 老師較少緊密控制每一個步驟時，學生會變得較少依賴別人。
questions.answer: The less closely teachers control every step, the less dependent students become.
questions.answerZh: 老師控制每一個步驟的程度越低，學生就越少依賴別人。
questions.highlight: The less closely teachers control every step, the less dependent students become.

questions.prompt: Experts warn that older adults may lose strength more easily when they do less exercise.
questions.promptZh: 專家警告，年長人士做較少運動時，可能會更容易失去體力。
questions.answer: Experts warn that the less exercise older adults do, the more easily they may lose strength.
questions.answerZh: 專家警告，年長人士做的運動越少，就可能越容易失去體力。
questions.highlight: Experts warn that the less exercise older adults do, the more easily they may lose strength.

questions.prompt: A school's more careful explanation of its rules is likely to reduce parents' confusion.
questions.promptZh: 學校更仔細地解釋規則，可能會減少家長的疑惑。
questions.answer: The more carefully a school explains its rules, the less confusion parents are likely to experience.
questions.answerZh: 學校越仔細地解釋規則，家長可能感到的疑惑就越少。
questions.highlight: The more carefully a school explains its rules, the less confusion parents are likely to experience.

questions.prompt: Checking a building's emergency equipment less often makes the building less safe.
questions.promptZh: 較少檢查大樓的緊急設備，會令大樓變得較不安全。
questions.answer: The less often a building's emergency equipment is checked, the less safe the building becomes.
questions.answerZh: 大樓的緊急設備越少接受檢查，大樓就越不安全。
questions.highlight: The less often a building's emergency equipment is checked, the less safe the building becomes.

questions.prompt: A report with less unnecessary information is likely to leave readers less confused.
questions.promptZh: 報告包含較少不必要的資料，讀者便可能較少感到困惑。
questions.answer: The less unnecessary information a report contains, the less confused readers are likely to feel.
questions.answerZh: 報告包含的不必要資料越少，讀者就越不容易感到困惑。
questions.highlight: The less unnecessary information a report contains, the less confused readers are likely to feel.

questions.prompt: Some employees may spend less time travelling during busy periods when working hours become more flexible.
questions.promptZh: 工作時間變得更有彈性時，部分員工在繁忙時段花在交通上的時間可能會減少。
questions.answer: The more flexible working hours become, the less time some employees may spend travelling during busy periods.
questions.answerZh: 工作時間越有彈性，部分員工在繁忙時段花在交通上的時間可能就越少。
questions.highlight: The more flexible working hours become, the less time some employees may spend travelling during busy periods.

questions.prompt: When managers place less pressure on staff, small mistakes are less likely to be hidden.
questions.promptZh: 當經理向員工施加較少壓力時，小錯誤便較不容易被隱瞞。
questions.answer: The less pressure managers place on staff, the less likely small mistakes are to be hidden.
questions.answerZh: 經理向員工施加的壓力越少，小錯誤就越不容易被隱瞞。
questions.highlight: The less pressure managers place on staff, the less likely small mistakes are to be hidden.

questions.prompt: When a community discusses local problems more openly, residents may develop more trust in one another.
questions.promptZh: 當社區更公開地討論本地問題時，居民彼此之間可能會建立更多信任。
questions.answer: The more openly a community discusses local problems, the more trust residents may develop in one another.
questions.answerZh: 社區越公開地討論本地問題，居民彼此之間可能建立的信任就越多。
questions.highlight: The more openly a community discusses local problems, the more trust residents may develop in one another.

questions.prompt: Studies suggest that less time spent comparing themselves with others online may leave young people less dissatisfied with their own lives.
questions.promptZh: 研究顯示，年輕人若較少花時間在網上與他人比較，可能會較少對自己的生活感到不滿。
questions.answer: Studies suggest that the less time young people spend comparing themselves with others online, the less dissatisfied they may feel with their own lives.
questions.answerZh: 研究顯示，年輕人花在網上與他人比較的時間越少，就可能越少對自己的生活感到不滿。
questions.highlight: Studies suggest that the less time young people spend comparing themselves with others online, the less dissatisfied they may feel with their own lives.

questions.prompt: The same problem is less likely to be ignored when a public service records complaints more carefully.
questions.promptZh: 公共服務機構更仔細地記錄投訴時，同一問題便較不容易被忽視。
questions.answer: The more carefully a public service records complaints, the less likely the same problem is to be ignored.
questions.answerZh: 公共服務機構記錄投訴時越仔細，同一問題就越不容易被忽視。
questions.highlight: The more carefully a public service records complaints, the less likely the same problem is to be ignored.

questions.prompt: People are more willing to complete an application correctly when the process is less complicated.
questions.promptZh: 申請程序較不複雜時，人們會更願意正確完成申請。
questions.answer: The less complicated an application process is, the more willing people are to complete it correctly.
questions.answerZh: 申請程序越不複雜，人們就越願意正確完成申請。
questions.highlight: The less complicated an application process is, the more willing people are to complete it correctly.

questions.prompt: I have come to believe that examining more evidence should make us less certain about simple answers.
questions.promptZh: 我逐漸相信，審視更多證據應該令我們對簡單答案較不肯定。
questions.answer: I have come to believe that the more evidence we examine, the less certain we should be about simple answers.
questions.answerZh: 我逐漸相信，我們審視的證據越多，就越不應對簡單答案過分肯定。
questions.highlight: I have come to believe that the more evidence we examine, the less certain we should be about simple answers.
